images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful young Japanese female model embodying a playful nurse aesthetic, sitting casually on a sleek kitchen counter. She wears a form-fitting, slightly cropped white cotton tee that clings to her ample chest, paired with vintage-wash straight-leg denim jeans that accentuate her slim waist and curvy hips. Dappled light through leaves filters through a nearby window, casting bright, natural highlights across her flawless skin texture, visible pores, and faint vellus hair, while cool blue city tones infuse the scene with an avant-garde artistic atmosphere. She leans back with weight on her hands, locking eyes with the camera in a seductive smile, exuding a confident yet intimate allure. The background is a blurred modern apartment interior, creating a shallow depth of field. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, ray tracing, global illumination, hyper-detailed, sharp focus.8k photo, Large breasts
